script:
set +e
printf '=== ts ===\n'; date -u +%FT%TZ
printf '=== SENDER var in mskai-responder ===\n'; grep -n -E '^SENDER\s*=' /home/azureuser/mskai-responder.py || true
printf '=== mskai-send-to.sh full ===\n'; cat /home/azureuser/mskai-send-to.sh 2>/dev/null || true
printf '=== alternate sender names ===\n'; ls /home/azureuser/mskai-*send* /home/azureuser/mskai-*post* 2>/dev/null || true
printf '=== compare: emily working sender ===\n'; cat /home/azureuser/emily-send-to.sh 2>/dev/null || cat /home/azureuser/emilyclaude-send-to.sh 2>/dev/null || true
printf '=== compare: aixa working sender ===\n'; cat /home/azureuser/aixa-send-to.sh 2>/dev/null || true
printf '=== mskai-responder.py lines 750-820 (post_reply def + caller) ===\n'; sed -n '750,820p' /home/azureuser/mskai-responder.py 2>/dev/null || true
printf '=== aixa-responder lines around its post_reply (sibling reference) ===\n'; grep -n 'subprocess.run.*SENDER\|def post_reply\|def _post_reply' /home/azureuser/aixa-responder.py 2>/dev/null || true
printf '=== aixa-responder post_reply context ===\n'; awk '/def _post_reply_orig|def post_reply\b/,/^def [a-z]/' /home/azureuser/aixa-responder.py 2>/dev/null | head -40 || true
printf '=== END ===\n'
